"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-8pBSO8T"}}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-speWkl0"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Purpose & Overview "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                         ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-kiKBdsA"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson Electric is committed to integrating modern technology into our daily workflows to help employees work smarter, not harder. Artificial intelligence (AI) tools offer our team a powerful way to reduce time spent on repetitive tasks, improve accuracy in reporting, and free up valuable time for higher-value work that requires human expertise and judgment. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Q3s1M00"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This policy provides a framework for how AI should be used across the organization. It ensures that every team member understands the boundaries, expectations, and best practices associated with AI usage. By following this policy, we protect our company's data, maintain client trust, and maximize the benefits that AI can bring to our operations. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yimzxqG"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and temporary staff who have been granted access to AI tools through the company. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-L5IhixT"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-IfQb3U7"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"How AI Supports Our Work "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                             ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-tiqf3yt"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"AI is being introduced at Tumlinson Electric to serve as a productivity assistant. It is not a replacement for professional judgment or skilled labor \u2014 it is a tool that handles the time-consuming, repetitive portions of our work so our people can focus on what they do best. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Ejhp1Of"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-OnNQ9nL"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Automating Repetitive Tasks "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-LSgg93j"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Many of our daily workflows involve repetitive actions such as formatting documents, drafting routine emails, organizing data, generating standard reports, and summarizing meeting notes. AI tools can handle these tasks in seconds, saving significant time across the organization. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jZaVuUa"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-cYIqssC"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Spreadsheet Analysis & Reporting "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Wr3yOi3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"One of the most impactful uses of AI at Tumlinson Electric is in spreadsheet analysis and report generation. AI can quickly analyze large datasets, identify trends, flag anomalies, create summaries, and generate charts or formatted reports. This is especially useful for financial reporting, project tracking, inventory management, and operational metrics. Employees are encouraged to use AI to assist with data analysis tasks to improve both speed and accuracy. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-tIK8W6h"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-3lIpWvb"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Additional Use Cases "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-3W4m4yT"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Drafting and proofreading emails, proposals, and internal communications "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-eKIjJB6"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Summarizing lengthy documents, contracts, or specifications "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-EBCaL1b"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Creating templates for recurring reports or project documentation "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-lmOCayd"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Brainstorming ideas for process improvements or project planning "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-oLPGqVO"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Translating technical language into plain-language summaries for clients "}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-gRvbBqH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Access & Subscription Plan "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jHhTKHh"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Rather than providing AI subscriptions to every employee, we'll be granting access based on how AI is being integrated into specific roles and workflows across the organization. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-qViLz0c"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Standard Plan \u2014 $25\/month per seat","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-SUOLu6v"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Available to select employees. Covers core AI capabilities including text generation, data analysis, document summarization, and general productivity assistance. As adoption grows and AI proves its value across more departments, "},{"type":"text","text":"premium seats","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" will be made available at the discretion of executive leadership. Premium plans may offer expanded capabilities such as higher usage limits, advanced features, priority access, or specialized integrations. Executives will evaluate departmental needs and allocate premium seats where they see the greatest return on investment. Employees interested in premium access should discuss the need with their direct manager, who can escalate the request to leadership for consideration. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-KGJJYMn"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-sdIeKox"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Submitting AI Ideas "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-1EEWgHv"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"We encourage every team member to think creatively about how AI can improve our operations. If you have an idea for a more advanced or in-depth AI application \u2014 such as automating a complex workflow, building a custom integration, or developing an AI-powered tool for a specific department \u2014 we want to hear about it. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-P8tfIzg"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Submit all in-depth AI ideas and proposals to:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-2g3wxxE"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"zevans@tumlinsonelectric.com","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ulvvkOS"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Your idea will be reviewed and placed on the AI backlog for evaluation and prioritization. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-acFpom1"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When submitting an idea, please include a brief description of the problem you are trying to solve, how you envision AI helping, and any relevant details about the workflow or process involved. This helps leadership evaluate and prioritize ideas effectively."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-acFpom1"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-tuPaEV1"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"General AI Usage Practices "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                         ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ASg1dAe"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"All employees should follow these general practices when using AI tools: "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hiPqVo7"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Use AI as an assistant, not a replacement.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" AI-generated output should always be reviewed by a human before being sent to a client, submitted as a deliverable, or used to make business decisions. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ror8M4o"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Keep it professional.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" AI tools provided by the company should be used for work-related purposes. Personal use should be minimal and should never interfere with work responsibilities. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-lcFQXCp"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Be transparent.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" If a client or stakeholder asks whether AI was used in preparing a document or analysis, be honest. Transparency builds trust. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-iSC4DSw"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Stay within your expertise.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" AI can help you draft or analyze, but the final product should reflect your professional knowledge. Do not submit AI output on topics outside your area of competency without proper review. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-XirNv3f"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Report issues promptly.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" If an AI tool produces incorrect, biased, or concerning output, report it to your manager. Understanding limitations helps us improve how we use these tools. "}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-t1Bh1d6"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-qCtUh3I"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Data Privacy & Confidentiality "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                         ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-9ouIlnD"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"IMPORTANT:","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#7d6608"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" Be extremely careful about what information you upload to or enter into any AI system. Data entered into AI platforms may be stored, processed, or used to train models depending on the platform and plan. Always err on the side of caution.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#7d6608"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-9TIqSMS"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-r9YQkQu"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Information You Must NEVER Upload to AI Tools "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-dniZetN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Social Security numbers, bank account numbers, or personal financial information of employees or clients "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jmF4Jvk"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Client passwords, security credentials, or access keys "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-16wSAQy"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Personally identifiable information (PII) of clients or employees beyond what is necessary "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-bVCOYGO"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Confidential bid pricing, proprietary cost structures, or trade secrets "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-BiKEiKr"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Protected health information (PHI) or medical records "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-EA9qhe0"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Legal documents under attorney-client privilege "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-xvmpGlN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Any data subject to non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) without explicit approval "}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-DhjsZje"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-1w3Y137"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Information to Use with Caution "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-EtygAH9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Some information may be entered into AI tools with appropriate care. Before uploading, remove or redact any identifying details when possible. Examples include general project data (with client names removed), internal process descriptions, and anonymized financial figures for analysis. When in doubt, consult your manager before uploading any company data. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-OL7C29m"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-C0sg3RL"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Platform Awareness "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-3i2OhLm"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Understand the data retention and privacy policies of the AI platform you are using. Some platforms store conversation history, while others offer options to disable data retention. Use the most privacyprotective settings available. If the company provides specific platform configuration guidance, follow it. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-DGRoXPz"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-ACBYkNL"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Best Practices for Effective AI Use "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-N8HkpfD"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Write Clear, Specific Prompts "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-7bpGpxn"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The quality of AI output depends heavily on the quality of your input. Be specific about what you need, provide relevant context, and define the format you expect. For example, instead of asking \"summarize this,\" try \"summarize this project update in three bullet points for a client-facing email.\" "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-6QFTEvZ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Always Review and Edit Output "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-XGHBe9p"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Never send AI-generated content directly without reviewing it first. Check for factual accuracy, appropriate tone, correct formatting, and alignment with company standards. AI can make mistakes, fabricate details, or produce content that does not match our brand voice. "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-sx7dfrx"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Iterate and Refine "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-VSeRJvd"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If the first output is not what you need, refine your prompt rather than starting from scratch. Provide feedback to the AI about what to change. Building on previous output is often more efficient than reprompting from the beginning. "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-nyjUf3k"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Use AI for Drafts, Not Finals "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-DDRY1nv"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Think of AI as a first-draft generator. It can get you 70\u201380% of the way there quickly, but the final 20\u2013 30% \u2014 the polish, accuracy checks, and professional judgment \u2014 must come from you. "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-CowHfNj"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Document Your Workflows "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-BP2sxBF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If you develop an effective AI workflow or prompt template that saves time, document it and share it with your team. Building a library of proven prompts and processes helps the entire organization benefit from what individuals learn. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-54yz88O"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-ylnxcgG"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prohibited Uses "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-XAAbTv3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The following uses of AI tools are strictly prohibited at Tumlinson Electric: "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ivjairH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Uploading classified, restricted, or highly sensitive data","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" as outlined in Section 6 "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-grVuj8D"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Using AI to generate false, misleading, or deceptive content","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" for clients, regulatory bodies, or internal stakeholders "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ZxTiHe7"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Submitting AI-generated work as a licensed professional deliverable","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" (such as engineering stamps or certified reports) without thorough professional review and sign-off "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Cf5yk52"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Using AI to make automated decisions","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" that affect employee evaluations, hiring, or termination without human review "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pdah9Z5"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Bypassing company security protocols","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" by using unauthorized AI tools, browser extensions, or third-party platforms not approved by the company "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-0prO7q9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Using company AI accounts for personal projects,","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" side businesses, or non-work-related activities "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-cehdeel"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Sharing AI account credentials","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" with anyone inside or outside the organization "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-3J68Rw0"}}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-mKaT9MF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Quality Control & Human Oversight "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-4TkDKDI"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"AI tools are powerful but imperfect. They can produce outputs that sound confident but are factually incorrect, incomplete, or inappropriate for the context. To maintain our standards of quality, the following safeguards are required: "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-wAefjnX"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Human-in-the-loop:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Every AI-generated deliverable must be reviewed by a qualified employee before it is finalized or shared externally. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-P6cwGH2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Cross-check critical data:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Any numbers, statistics, or technical specifications produced by AI must be verified against original sources before use. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yPeK3tB"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Escalate uncertainty:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" If you are unsure whether AI output is accurate or appropriate, consult a colleague or manager before proceeding. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-S6asOoH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Maintain accountability:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" The employee who submits or sends a deliverable is responsible for its accuracy, regardless of whether AI was used in its creation."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-S6asOoH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" "}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-bPbUk6D"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Compliance & Legal Considerations "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-R0TTAmk"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Employees must ensure that their use of AI complies with all applicable laws, regulations, and contractual obligations. Key considerations include: "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-gF7WlCf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Intellectual property:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" AI-generated content may raise questions about ownership and copyright. Do not represent AI-generated work as wholly original without understanding the implications. Consult leadership if intellectual property concerns arise. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-nF83mn8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Client contracts:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Some client agreements may contain provisions about the use of automated tools or AI. Review relevant contract terms or consult your project manager before using AI on client-facing work. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Pfc74Xn"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Regulatory compliance:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" For work that falls under regulatory oversight, ensure that AI usage does not violate any industry-specific regulations or standards. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-5Llp1LY"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Record keeping:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Maintain appropriate records of significant AI-assisted work for audit and compliance purposes when required. "}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-KZSrOjV"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-ovPzIVx"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Training & Support "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hLvEZC4"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson Electric is committed to supporting employees as they learn to use AI tools effectively. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Xri5nZY"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Resources and support will include: "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-R9lmUdQ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Onboarding guidance for new AI tool users, including platform setup and basic usage "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-7Y39U3A"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tips, prompt templates, and workflow examples shared across teams "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-OSAAUwy"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"A designated point of contact for AI-related questions and troubleshooting "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-6n7Ma7L"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Periodic check-ins to assess how AI is being used and identify opportunities for improvement "}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Iu8LpLp"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Employees are encouraged to ask questions, experiment within the guidelines of this policy, and share their learnings with colleagues. The more we learn together, the more value AI brings to our work. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-CODUCot"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"id":"pm-tqCZExi"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Policy Updates & Acknowledgment "},{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                         ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-gcZ4NaN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This policy is a living document and will be updated as AI technology evolves and as our organization gains experience with these tools. Employees will be notified of significant changes and may be required to re-acknowledge the policy upon major revisions. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-l3vsVQK"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"By using company-provided AI tools, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this policy and agree to abide by its guidelines. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-MyaE1QF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"                                                                                                                                          ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-FqVml6y"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":"\t"},{"type":"text","text":"Employee Name: ","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"\t"},{"type":"text","text":"______________________________________","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#5d6d7e"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ElMzrO2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":"\t"},{"type":"text","text":"Signature: ","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"\t"},{"type":"text","text":"______________________________________","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#5d6d7e"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-vstkife"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":" ","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#000000"}}]},{"type":"text","text":"\t"},{"type":"text","text":"Date: ","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"\t"},{"type":"text","text":"______________________________________","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#5d6d7e"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]}]}

steps.name: Fixture Take-off
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-G1US8um"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Bluebeam is a powerful tool that allows our team to perform detailed material takeoffs, lighting counts, equipment inventories, and other project evaluations. One of the key capabilities is the ability to conduct a comprehensive fixture takeoff."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-PNqJL6z"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-geQd4Lk"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"By leveraging the markup tools within Bluebeam, we can precisely identify and count each fixture type across the project plans. This provides us with a detailed inventory that can be sorted and analyzed in numerous ways. For example, we can view the fixture types by level, by building, or across the entire project."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ZCd1Lzg"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-IohIfml"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This level of granular data is invaluable for several reasons: - Ensuring we order the correct quantities and types of fixtures - Identifying potential areas of over or under-lighting - Providing accurate fixture counts for material procurement and budgeting - Enabling detailed project cost analysis and forecasting"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-4BBb2Cr"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-PKkGvPa"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"To conduct an effective fixture takeoff in Bluebeam, our team follows these best practices:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-zQybnx0"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-zQrxBJH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"1. Carefully review the project plans to identify all fixture types and locations. 2. Use the appropriate markup tools (e.g. clouds, callouts, symbols) to highlight and count each fixture. 3. Organize the markups by level, building, or other relevant criteria to facilitate sorting and analysis. 4. Regularly validate the takeoff against the plans to ensure completeness and accuracy. 5. Export the takeoff data to a spreadsheet or other format for further analysis and reporting.","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ZqOtacX"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-7bIMVFR"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"By adhering to these best practices, we are able to deliver high-quality fixture takeoffs that support efficient material ordering, accurate project budgeting, and comprehensive project analysis. This ultimately helps us to deliver projects on time and within budget."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-5aAy1Qw"}},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20240828_214824_mi_0qsb7728lnrmja8mvg6z0fprz8dbmohbn_7bntcvrbbw2b.png","alt":"","asset":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20240828_214824_mi_0qsb7728lnrmja8mvg6z0fprz8dbmohbn_7bntcvrbbw2b.png","title":"","width":"100%","id":"pm-Cm44vgE"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-fEuOkZw"}}]}

steps.name: Sharemytoolbox Login and Tool Management
steps.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-CsT3hyw"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-CsT3hyw"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Downloading the App","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
The first step is to download the Sharemytoolbox app onto your iPad and/or phone. This app will allow you to manage your tool orders and returns."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-CK9hoV0"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-CfqlBzt"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Logging In","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
Once the app is installed, you will need to log in using the username and password provided by the Warehouse Manager. This will give you access to the full functionality of the tool management system."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-vCVo9oV"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-VaWye18"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Placing a Tool Order","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
To order a tool, use the search bar in the app to find the specific tool you need. For example, if you are looking for a 1-foot bender, type "bender" into the search bar and all available 1-foot benders will be displayed."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-4HL1Kij"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-eyiVvjn"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Click on the tool you need, select "Borrow", and then enter the location where the tool should be delivered, such as your assigned job site. Be sure to include the location - do not just select "Borrow" without specifying the delivery location."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-tdExH87"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-NBPcKLW"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"After placing the order, follow up with the Warehouse Manager via email to let them know a tool has been requested."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-WqsQqDJ"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-PI47Msg"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Unavailable Tools","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
If a tool you need is not available in the app, that means it is currently in use out in the field. Notify the Warehouse Manager, and they will reach out to the Foreman or Superintendent to determine when the tool can be returned or released."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Qu2VkeL"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Mee16P2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Once an order is placed, tools and equipment will typically be delivered within 48 hours, although some orders may take longer depending on the job location."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-6YAAmp0"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-LQFl2h7"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Returning and Cleaning Tools","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
When it's time to return tools, log back into the Sharemytoolbox app and select the tools that need to be cleaned and returned. Follow up with the Warehouse Manager to schedule the tool clean-off and return."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-7l02o2M"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-zjLUvBI"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Once the tools are returned to the warehouse and inspected, they will be properly checked in on the app and made available for use by the rest of the field team."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ypyxQUm"}}]}

steps.name: Maintaining Tool Inventory
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-DYrY1lz"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Effective tool management is critical to the success of our projects. By using the Sharemytoolbox app, we can ensure that the tools and equipment needed are available when and where they are required. This helps to minimize delays, improve productivity, and keep our projects on schedule."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-R4x1XRu"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-dnldnbC"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Regular communication with the Warehouse Manager is key to maintaining an accurate tool inventory. By promptly reporting any issues or unavailable tools, we can work together to resolve problems and ensure the tools are returned and ready for the next job."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-54KPHVG"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-KfhonNW"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Following the proper procedures for ordering, borrowing, and returning tools will help to keep our tool inventory organized and well-maintained. This, in turn, supports the overall efficiency and effectiveness of our operations."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Dw7FROh"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-tH2u9DU"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"By working together to effectively manage our tool resources, we can contribute to the success of Tumlinson Electric and deliver high-quality work for our clients."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-W3UuFJt"}}]}

This is important as it fully closes and logs you out off applications like CE, pVault, Accubid, Excel, Outlook.","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-xOhEolr"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"There is audio on the video so you must watch locally on your laptop OFF SERVER, or you may even watch on your phone or ipad.","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]},{"type":"text","text":"\u00a0","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-y1j4C4n"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Hym6uOn"}},{"type":"embed_frame","attrs":{"srcdoc":"<iframe src=\"https:\/\/screenrec.com\/share\/7otdR235Ff\" allowfullscreen style=\"width:100%;height:100vh\" frameborder=\"0\"><\/iframe>","signature":"17179c646334e0c7fec60fc4453981048c45404642779dbc80834a3e1dba0204","width":"100%","height":"","id":"pm-EVS93kb"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-eshPiPB"}}]}

steps.name: Tumlinson Electric DUO Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) Guide
steps.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yMhQQPZ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If you are not currently a Remote Server user this information is still important incase your role or workload changes. To get completed status on this read everything carefully and at the bottom of the page click next until you reach completed.","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yMhQQPZ"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yMhQQPZ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"DUO Authentication Method Update","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yMhQQPZ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson Electric is transitioning from push notifications (Approve or Deny) to SMS text message verification for accessing our Remote Server. This new multi-factor authentication process enhances our security protocols by providing a more direct and trackable verification method."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Zy5eiWt"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-JYBApnw"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"New Login Procedure","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
1. Enter your standard username and password on the login screen
2. Select "Text me new code" at the bottom of the authentication screen
3. Wait for the SMS text message containing your unique verification code
4. Enter the code exactly as received in the designated verification field
5. Complete login after successful code verification"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-zlIX5Sa"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-QAt01Cq"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Security Protocols for Unexpected Codes","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pq3heEr"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Unexpected Authentication Code Procedure If you receive an SMS verification code that you did not request, immediately take the following actions: "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pq3heEr"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"- Do NOT attempt to log into the Remote Server "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pq3heEr"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"- Send an email to both of the below email addresses:  "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pq3heEr"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"LCoker@tumlinsonelectric.com and Support@tumlinsonelectric.com"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-TXI3ElO"}},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https://waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/uploads/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t/20241213_184256_mi_0qyc0enzjyggg1z1rzyouybyttyhunl6m_zfxyck6z4tpd.png","alt":"","asset":"https://waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/uploads/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t/20241213_184256_mi_0qyc0enzjyggg1z1rzyouybyttyhunl6m_zfxyck6z4tpd.png","title":"","width":"100%","id":"pm-WxpqhFo"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-XDc1lDq"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-umkCm40"}}]}

steps.name: Incident Reporting Details
steps.content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-GqpeVx3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In your incident report email, include the following information:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-GqpeVx3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"- Date and time you received the unexpected code "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-GqpeVx3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"- The phone number where the unexpected code was received "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-GqpeVx3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"- Any additional context or suspicious circumstances"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-QkyKGhh"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-GhdiGVF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Wait for Confirmation","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
Do not attempt to access the Remote Server until you receive an official confirmation from the IT support team that it is safe to do so. Our IT security team will investigate any potential unauthorized access attempts and provide guidance on next steps."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-XRqQuBn"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-d4fDRmZ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Code Confidentiality","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"
- Never share your verification codes with anyone
- Each code is unique and valid for a short time period
- Codes are for single-use authentication only"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-lQVqfF6"}}]}

steps.name: Project Specific Drug Testing Letter PM Policy
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-fbL0R32"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Drug Test Letter Overview","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-LQmmv5M"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Many projects that Tumlinson is contracted for require mandatory drug testing before an employee is allowed on the job site. In these cases, the project manager is required to send a \"drug testing letter\" to the general contractor confirming that Tumlinson has drug tested each employee before sending the employee to the jobsite."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-D2WqLwL"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Drug Test Letter Policy","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-vNiWYNb"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson has a standard drug testing letter that MUST be used in these cases. This document is saved in drug test letter under TE documents\/Project Management\/Drug Test Letter in Waybook for your use, this MUST NOT be modified without COO approval."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-2Eq6i0W"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The PM must have a \"passed\" confirmation email from the Office Manager for every employee on the drug test letter before sending the letter to the GC. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-wPKiome"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When the PM sends the drug test letter to the GC, they MUST copy the Office Manager, General Superintendent and Site Super\/Foreman."}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-AHQON2a"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Drug Test Letter Modifications","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-83HWCyf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If the GC responds and wants to modify this letter in any way, the PM must notify the Office Manager of the requested changes and they will present the requested changes to the COO for approval. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-83HWCyf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When requesting these changes the PM must provide the Office Manager with the following:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-83HWCyf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The email or document with the requested changes."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-3Y5F3V9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Contact info for person requesting the changes."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-aZDqH5o"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Check the following documents for any language in reference to a drug test letter, this documentation must be sent to the Office Manager along with the request."}]}]}]},{"type":"ordered_list","attrs":{"order":1},"content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-83HWCyf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Executed Contract "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-wvE46MF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Bid documents or sample contract from bid day."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hQ64qXX"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"GC's safety manual in the contract or bid day sample safety manual."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-mjOxv6J"}}]}

steps.name: Instructions
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ar3izoH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Team,","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-d587O9g"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Following up on the drug test letter policy, this is approved by the board and is now TE policy.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-206Npk9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"A few of bullet points:","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-vxZnJKq"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Use the TE letter unless another letter has been approved by Brandi\/Kenneth T.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-2IXdnUv"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Do not sign the letter or add employees unless you have an email from Brandi stating they have passed the required UA.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-kALL65M"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Copy Brandi the Site foreman\/superintendent and the General Superintendent when you send it to the GC.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hG774RX"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-6cGqoly"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"There are other parts of this policy that will be completed by others, this is the Project management part of the policy.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]}

steps.name: Importance of Email Groups
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-ITbEKWH"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Important Reminder About Using Email Groups in Outlook"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-20USOgO"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-EoEJWwF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"To ensure your emails reach everyone they\u2019re supposed to, please follow this guidance when using email groups\u2014especially ones that change often like Foremen, Field, PM Team, or All TE."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-7yX2mqC"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-ienqvC2"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Why This Matters"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-xRgZRvJ"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-C3OPiJW"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Some email groups at Tumlinson Electric are updated regularly. This means names are added or removed often based on staffing changes. However, several people have recently reported that certain employees aren\u2019t receiving group emails\u2014when in reality, they are in the group. The issue comes from how the email group is selected."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-iE44mgk"}},{"type":"aside","attrs":{"id":"pm-tDR6caP"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-3RazuSN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Note:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Keeping email groups updated is crucial for effective communication."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-0FfxS1f"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-beX0h0S"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Common Issue"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Q6hCx9d"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-8nQNqZt"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When you type a group name (like Field or Foremen) directly into the \u201cTo\u201d bar of your email, Outlook will auto-fill it with the last version you used. That version might be outdated, and it may not include the most recent updates to the group. This can lead to some recipients not receiving important communications. Do not use Email groups from your phone or Ipad unless you have just used updated version on your laptop."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-LRqkMOV"}}]}

steps.name: Correct Usage
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-Vpwgknm"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Correct Way to Use Email Groups"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-gkmPR2w"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-tNyURSd"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"To ensure you\u2019re using the most up-to-date version of any group, follow these steps:"}]},{"type":"ordered_list","attrs":{"order":1},"content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-OuKdf9R"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Open a new email in Outlook on your laptop."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-q3riVCc"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Click on the \u201cTo\u201d button."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-fKlmvC8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In the Global Address List, search for the group name (Field, Operations, Foremen, etc.)."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Cwd4e1N"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Select the group from the Global Address List."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-0S2J2a1"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Click OK to insert it into the \u201cTo\u201d field. Doing it this way pulls the most current version of the group, ensuring everyone meant to receive the email actually does."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-vI1YmTs"}},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20250612_210330_mi_0r6txaejgk5rw2yb9uwgsqpnzemy3ggja_kawunowwai6y.png","alt":"","asset":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20250612_210330_mi_0r6txaejgk5rw2yb9uwgsqpnzemy3ggja_kawunowwai6y.png","title":"","width":"63%","id":"pm-iYhhC9q"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-saS8bqn"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-Mhqm6P1"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Best have any questions about this process."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-sKaeath"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-VXKvPsi"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\ud83d\udd0d\ufe0fIf If you ever notice any discrepancies let Logan Coker know."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-0wD8R8d"}},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20250612_212217_mi_0r6ty1ord52irz0c0v253t5icgiowseby_3ijb4kehde0h.png","alt":"","asset":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20250612_212217_mi_0r6ty1ord52irz0c0v253t5icgiowseby_3ijb4kehde0h.png","title":"","width":"60%","id":"pm-krpno3W"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-7aY4IrV"}}]}

steps.name: Overview
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ZZoVxAl"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"As a email user you will be sent "},{"type":"text","text":"SPAM","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" that's obvious and some that's more convincing. Please carefully read this overview and take the "},{"type":"text","text":"QUIZ","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" that follows."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ZZoVxAl"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ZZoVxAl"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Remember "},{"type":"text","text":"do NOT forward any email","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" you suspect to be spam or phishing. Instead, take a "},{"type":"text","text":"screenshot","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" of the email \u2014 making sure to include the sender, subject line, and message content \u2014 and send the image to both:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Z1trArX"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"lcoker@tumlinsonelectric.com","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-xJQM00C"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"support@tumlinsonelectric.com","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-op0mK3G"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Forwarding these emails increases the risk of spreading harmful content, even unintentionally. It's critical that we all follow this process to protect ourselves and the company."}]},{"type":"horizontal_rule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-Q33r8Vw"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\ud83d\udd0d What to watch for:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pvynzEW"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Do you know the sender?","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Fr1ed0e"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Does the message make sense based on your usual conversations with them?","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-aBgBJ3Q"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hover over the sender\u2019s email \u2014 does it match the name shown?","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-SHtBWpc"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Are there unexpected attachments, strange links, or urgent requests?","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-qXXoLD9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Is the tone, grammar, or timing odd (like something sent at 2am)?","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-fPNp7BO"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\u26a0\ufe0f Obvious Red Flags:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Lg3aLSs"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If it looks like it\u2019s from ","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"you","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":", but you didn\u2019t send it \u2014 it's spam.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pfVj2C5"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If it shows as a \u201cnote to self\u201d or contains content you didn\u2019t create \u2014 it's spam.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontal_rule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-ieG8bnZ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\ud83d\udea8 Specific Example:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-rhiLWtj"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If you receive an email that "},{"type":"text","text":"appears","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" to come from "},{"type":"text","text":"Logan Coker","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":", with a subject like "},{"type":"text","text":"\u201cSalary\u201d","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":", sent around "},{"type":"text","text":"10:00 PM","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":", and it includes an "},{"type":"text","text":"attachment and a link to a voicemail","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":", this is "},{"type":"text","text":"definitely spam","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":". Logan does "},{"type":"text","text":"not","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" send voicemails at night or discuss salary in that format. Any company Voicemails would come from GRASSHOPPER. Our Spam Filter Program is called Barracuda."}]},{"type":"horizontal_rule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-1rI7h9R"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\ud83d\udee1\ufe0f A Final Note:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-pDf2B84"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"We are actively adding "},{"type":"text","text":"additional layers of protection","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" against these rapidly advancing spam and phishing threats. But at the end of the day, the "},{"type":"text","text":"best line of defense is your common sense","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-q2O0eyV"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When something feels off, it probably is. "},{"type":"text","text":"Don\u2019t click. Don\u2019t forward. Screenshot and report it.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hzS4m3R"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Thanks for your continued attention and help in keeping our systems safe."}]}]}

steps.name: Key elements to a well written electrical RFI - ChatGPT
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-tdGJ3Ks"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"A well-written electrical Request for Information (RFI) should contain key elements to effectively communicate your inquiries or requests for clarification regarding electrical aspects of a project. Here are the key elements:","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"ordered_list","attrs":{"order":1},"content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-myeSWW3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Clear Identification","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Clearly identify the project, including its name, location, and any relevant project numbers or identifiers.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-YEQBrms"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Sender Information","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Provide your company's name, contact information, and the name and position of the person sending the RFI.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-saL18XF"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Recipient Information","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Clearly indicate who the RFI is addressed to, including the recipient's name, title, and contact information.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-8rKWMVR"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Subject Line","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Use a concise and descriptive subject line that summarizes the purpose of the RFI.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-qUpPwKk"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Introduction","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Provide a brief introduction that states the purpose of the RFI and sets the context for the inquiries.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Mz3mPsu"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Project Overview","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Briefly describe the project, including its scope, objectives, timeline, and key stakeholders. This ensures that the recipient understands the background of the inquiry.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-fV072tV"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Detailed Inquiry","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Clearly state your questions or requests for information related to the electrical aspects of the project. Break down complex questions into concise points for clarity.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-W6cM0no"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Reference Documents","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Include references to relevant drawings, specifications, or other project documents that pertain to your inquiry. This helps the recipient understand the context of your questions.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-svYx5gx"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Impact Assessment","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Highlight the potential impact or consequences of not receiving clarification on the issues raised. This can include delays, cost implications, safety concerns, or quality issues.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-MpEHk5T"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Proposed Solutions","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":" (optional): If you have potential solutions or suggestions, you can include them in the RFI. However, be careful not to assume authority beyond your scope as a subcontractor.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-bONncky"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Contact Information","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Provide your contact information, including name, position, phone number, and email address. Encourage the recipient to reach out for further clarification if needed.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-O53v9z3"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Closure","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": End the RFI with a polite closing statement, expressing appreciation for the recipient's attention to the matter and anticipation of a prompt response.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-KLTnrXQ"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Review and Submission","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":": Before sending the RFI, review it carefully to ensure clarity, accuracy, and professionalism. Once satisfied, submit the RFI through the appropriate channels as per the project's communication protocols.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-AlADVKp"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"By incorporating these key elements into your electrical RFI, you can effectively communicate your inquiries and ensure that your questions are addressed promptly and accurately.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]}

This will need to be documented and issued to the GC as well as to the Office Manager.\u00a0"}]}]}

schedule.\u00a0 The Labor, Direct Job Expenses, and Mark-Ups on the Change Order Set Up Form must be adjusted accordingly.\u00a0 "},{"type":"text","text":"The Change Order Set Up Form","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","text":"must be reviewed and approved by the President through your PX for all projects.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0"}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-48dSns8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Project Manager shall review the change order take-off with the Site Superintendent\/Foreman before submission.\u202f This will ensure that the proper quantities, types of material, necessary equipment, and estimated hours are accounted for in the change order.\u202f The Site Superintendent\/Foreman may be more familiar or aware of changing jobsite conditions that may affect our labor productivity (labor units).\u202f\u00a0"}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-IWuT0vn"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Project Manager shall reference the Templates."}]}]}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-TJOA256"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Typical change order labor units should be priced at a NECA 2 and adjusted Up according to the complexity of the scope of work and jobsite conditions.\u00a0"}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Ywocmbi"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"All material should have 30% Mark Up after the link price or commodity hot sheet prices are input by estimating or the PM. Make sure that there is "},{"type":"text","text":"30% in the \u201cAdj %\u201d column","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":". This adds 30% to the net cost of material and does not show up on the client report."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hrOPKoN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Sub Contractor Mark Up "},{"type":"text","text":"has to be entered in the subs tab","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" with the cost. The sub contractor value is added below the line on the Totals tab so it does not add mark up to the sub contract number unless its added in the Sub Tab. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-P2JFfWE"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"On deductive change orders, margin\/profit should never be given back."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-K7aUiFf"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Provide customer with complete and accurate pricing with appropriate backup within allotted time. The Accubid \"notes tab\" shall include a list of detailed scope of work which will print on the first page of the pdf COR.\u00a0 Scope outline to include but not limited to: inclusions, exclusions, qualifications, request for additional time (if applicable), and pricing void date (as appropriate).\u00a0"}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-w5dxQfa"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Update the COR Log with the submission date in Accubid \"Job Info\" tab \"Notes\" when pricing is formally submitted. See Waybook\/PM Manual\/Cost Management."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-hwh9Ahe"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The change order status shall be \u201cPotential\u201d in Accubid until written Approval of pricing is received.\u00a0It will be \"submitted\" in Build\/Cost Management. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-DBFJr9A"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"All documentation associated with the Change Order shall be retained and saved in the corresponding Build Change Order COR folder.\u00a0"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-HOI9CbM"}}]}

steps.name: Approving an Invoice
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3,"id":"pm-CdEfJom"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Approving Vendor and Sub Invoices through pVault","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-9fC2q1m"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"NOTE: Invoice approval does not mean it will be paid right away. Tumlinson operates on a \""},{"type":"text","text":"Pay When Paid","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":"\" policy. The CFO will pay the invoice when he receives payment from the client for the month the vendor billed TE. The PM does not need to \"hold\" payment from the vendor in pVault for this reason, the CFO will do this. If this process takes too long, the project will more than likely be sent a lien notice for overdue payments to the vendor. The Client will then need a lien release for that month. Once the CFO receives payment for that month, he will then send a check to the vendor and the vendor will send a lien release for that month that the TE PM will send to the Client to clear it up."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-lzjQ5at"}},{"type":"ordered_list","attrs":{"order":1},"content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-kJmQ96q"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"From steps.name: Wrong Job or Cost Code
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jBvAwS9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Wrong Cost Code","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jBvAwS9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If an invoice is coded to the wrong project or cost code, the PM MUST reject the invoice in pVault. When you reject an invoice in pVault it will automatically pop up a \"notes\" window. The PM MUST note why the invoice is being rejected. If it is the wrong cost code, note the correct cost code for the AP manager so that she can correct it and send it back through pVault."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jBvAwS9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Wrong Project","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-jBvAwS9"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If it is the wrong project, reject the invoice and note it in the notes box letting the AP manager know whether or not you might know what project or PM it may belong to. "}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-3gCk7Kp"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Reject Invoice Button","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20240615_142110_mi_0qosyobp8el2kbvzimnz2p4noulri1dt9_06wn3hbiq50a.png","alt":"","asset":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20240615_142110_mi_0qosyobp8el2kbvzimnz2p4noulri1dt9_06wn3hbiq50a.png","title":"","width":"100%","id":"pm-xRSN5C0"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-ciV58IC"}}]}

steps.name: Hard PO's Invoiced Over Committed Remaining
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-NUMPIjV"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hard PO's Invoiced For More Than What Is Currently Committed","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-i7JfwwN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Important:","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#cc0606"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","text":"If you are invoiced over the committed cost, you MUST reject this invoice adding notes as to what the resolution for correction was (Increased PO, received credit) after resolving it with your vendor so the AP manager can make the corrections.","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-i7JfwwN"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If there is not enough money on the hard PO, you will see two lines in the bottom window in pVault. One line will have the amount left on the PO and will show the PO number. One line will have the remainder of the invoice amount that can not be charged to the hard PO, this amount is placed on the \"cost code\" not the hard PO. If you approve the invoice as it is entered, part will be charged to the hard PO and the remainder will be charged to the cost code. This will more than likely make you bust your cost code as a whole. When entered like this, most of the time it will need to be rejected, even if you received a credit from the vendor for the difference. "}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":4,"id":"pm-mj5eI5r"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Example of a Hard PO invoiced for more than committed "}]},{"type":"file_viewer","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/tumlinson-electric.waybook.com\/api\/media-items\/mi_0qnd1ogckm2ubntecml25i7mg3qjwybw8\/_download","extension":"pdf","filesize":83507,"mimetype":"","name":"Invoived over PO.pdf","id":"pm-byowjMx"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-NEEXHmb"}}]}

steps.name: Other Split Invoices in pVault
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-X8wn2GT"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"When approving invoices in pVault, pay attention to the lower window. There you will see what amount is being charged to what cost code. If it is split between a sub contract cost code and a standard cost code, that means you have gone over the PO amount. See \"Hard PO's Invoiced Over Committed\" in this section."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-EqnB5IE"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-gjnYDqO"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"If there are multiple lines in the lower window and both are charged to the sub contract number, that means that part is going towards the original sub contract and the rest is going to change orders on that same sub contract number."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-FrnyLJg"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Example:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-OXkhJFc"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In this example, the \"Category\" or cost code in both lines are being charged to the sub contract cost code. Part of the sub contractors invoice is for the remainder of the original sub contract, the rest of the invoice is put toward change orders (the second line). In this case there is enough committed cost to cover both so it is approved."}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20250221_155612_mi_0r1lz2k0yn2iprifx202rxepimsauhkml_xj7lx27dq99q.png","alt":"","asset":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20250221_155612_mi_0r1lz2k0yn2iprifx202rxepimsauhkml_xj7lx27dq99q.png","title":"","width":"100%","id":"pm-ln2idjX"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-t7T34o5"}}]}

docs.name: Setting Up Projects in Accubid CO

steps.name: Change Order Set Up Form
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-AWeW1KY"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":4,"id":"pm-qGEG8r8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The first Change Order on every project must have documentation with all parameters approved by the President of TE through your PX.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":{"color":"#258d8d"}}]},{"type":"text","text":" "}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-oH3BN6N"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"To make this request, the PM is to send the PX an email requesting change order parameters on the \""},{"type":"text","text":"TE Change Order Set Up Form","marks":[{"type":"deeplink","attrs":{"subject":"sub_0qko7apj5tgtagbxbmfvjnoo2ywxi9qe","document":"doc_0qkzjdp8t9idvthrmejwyovuoaqltsfn","step":"stp_0qlaydrhanflif5zabdgvmry77tqrzmz"}}]},{"type":"text","text":"\" found in Waybook Project Management Templates. The PM will fill this form out for the project according to what is in the contract documents and send to their PX for approval. The PX will send this form and all documentation to the President for final approval."}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-IR7rpvI"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The PM must send the PX the completed \"TE Change Order Set Up\" form and all contract documentation in this email that pertains to Change Orders, including:"}]},{"type":"bullet_list","content":[{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-wu96kGo"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Allowable mark up, general expenses, warranty charges, management charges and all requirements per the contract documents. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-E5tKtrT"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This includes any division 01 specs pertaining to CO\u2019s, front end bid documents with change order parameters, all contract language pertaining to CO\u2019s, wage scale for the project along with any other documentation in the contract documents pertaining to Change Order labor rates, allowable charges and mark up. "}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-rY3FRF8"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Do not send a link to the folder, do not send entire spec sections or an entire contract, break out only the pertinent pages in pdf format for the PX and President to have all available information without having to dig through the project documents. "}]}]}]}]},{"type":"list_item","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-Ltbz4nd"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"After the PX gets final approval from the President, the PX or a person trained and designated by the PX will set up all projects in Accubid Change Order. Accubid Change Order settings and reports are to be modified by the PX only."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-bvyimTe"}}]}
